pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly instructs adding Spanish (es) alongside English (en) in the generated spec guide.
setup_task.sh generated spec guide explicitly lists custom search engines with keywords 'vin', 'res', and 'plate'.
setup_task.sh generated spec guide requires exactly these four primary bookmark folders.
setup_task.sh generated spec guide explicitly instructs setting the download location to ~/Documents/Rental_Agreements.
setup_task.sh generated spec guide explicitly instructs setting the homepage to https://www.enterprise.com.

privileged_info_summary: The task synthetically generates a Chrome profile and a configuration guide. I verified that the guide explicitly requires adding Spanish to Chrome's languages alongside English, configuring exactly four primary bookmark folders ('Fleet & Reservations', 'Insurance & Compliance', 'Tourism Partners', 'Personal'), creating three custom search engine shortcuts with keywords 'vin', 'res', and 'plate', setting the homepage to enterprise.com, and setting the download directory to Rental_Agreements. All metadata claims exactly match the specifications injected via setup_task.sh.
